description: Implement LangChain tools for the agent (search_knowledge, check_stock, create_follow_up, get_customer_history, send_feedback_template, update_stock), create the RAG pipeline, build the LangGraph StateGraph agent orchestration with guard integration, and expose a new /api/agent/chat endpoint.
steps: Create src/lib/langchain/tools/search-knowledge.ts - Define a LangChain DynamicStructuredTool using zod schema. Input: query (string), limit (optional number). Implementation: call the existing BM25 search logic from src/app/api/agent/search/route.ts (extract the search logic into a shared function at src/lib/langchain/tools/utils/search-engine.ts). Return top results as formatted string.

Create src/lib/langchain/tools/check-stock.ts - DynamicStructuredTool. Input: productName (string) or sku (optional string). Implementation: query prisma.stockItem with name contains or sku match, return stock info (name, sku, quantity, price, category).

Create src/lib/langchain/tools/create-follow-up.ts - DynamicStructuredTool. Input: customerId (string), title (string), description (optional string), dueDate (string ISO), priority (optional enum). Implementation: create FollowUp via Prisma. Check action permission via isActionAllowed('CREATE_FOLLOWUP', config) before executing.

Create src/lib/langchain/tools/get-customer-history.ts - DynamicStructuredTool. Input: customerId (string), limit (optional number). Implementation: query conversations + messages for the customer, return formatted chat history.

Create src/lib/langchain/tools/send-feedback-template.ts - DynamicStructuredTool. Input: customerId (string), templateId (string). Implementation: fetch template, create feedback record. Check action permission via isActionAllowed('SEND_FEEDBACK_TEMPLATE', config).

Create src/lib/langchain/tools/update-stock.ts - DynamicStructuredTool. Input: stockItemId (string), type ('IN'|'OUT'), quantity (number), notes (optional string). Implementation: create StockMovement and update StockItem quantity (same logic as src/app/api/stok/movement/route.ts). Check isActionAllowed('UPDATE_STOCK', config).
Create src/lib/langchain/tools/index.ts - Export all tools, and a function getAgentTools(guardConfig: GuardConfig) that returns the array of tools with permission-aware wrappers.

Create src/lib/langchain/graph/state.ts - Define the AgentState interface using LangGraph Annotation: messages (BaseMessage[]), guardConfig (GuardConfig), sessionId (string), inputAllowed (boolean), contextDocuments (string[]), finalResponse (string), currentStep (string), metrics (array of metric objects), requiresApproval (boolean), approvalAction (object|null).

Create src/lib/langchain/graph/nodes/guard-input.ts - Node function that loads GuardConfig from DB (AgentGuardConfig model), runs processInput from agent-guard, sets inputAllowed in state. If blocked, sets finalResponse to rejection message.

Create src/lib/langchain/graph/nodes/retrieve-context.ts - Node function that performs hybrid search (BM25 + vector similarity if embeddings exist) using the user query. Retrieves relevant knowledge entries and memories. Stores results in state.contextDocuments.

Create src/lib/langchain/graph/nodes/llm-decide.ts - Node function that constructs the prompt with system prompt + context documents + conversation history, invokes LLM with tools bound, returns LLM response to state.messages.

Create src/lib/langchain/graph/nodes/execute-tool.ts - Node function that executes tool calls from LLM response using ToolNode pattern from @langchain/langgraph/prebuilt. Handles tool results and appends to messages.
Create src/lib/langchain/graph/nodes/guard-output.ts - Node function that runs processOutput from agent-guard on the final LLM text response. Sets state.finalResponse with sanitized content.

Create src/lib/langchain/graph/nodes/check-approval.ts - Node function that checks if the current tool action requires human approval. If so, creates HumanApprovalQueue entry and sets requiresApproval=true in state.

Create src/lib/langchain/graph/index.ts - Build the StateGraph: START -> guard_input -> (conditional: if not allowed, go to END) -> retrieve_context -> llm_decide -> (conditional: if tool_calls, go to execute_tool; else go to guard_output) -> execute_tool -> llm_decide (loop). guard_output -> END. Compile and export the graph as agentGraph.

Create src/app/api/agent/chat/route.ts - POST endpoint. Accepts { message: string, sessionId?: string, customerId?: string }. Creates/reuses AgentSession. Invokes the compiled graph with the user message. Records AgentMetrics for the request. Returns { response: string, sessionId: string }. Implements streaming-ready structure.
Verify: npm run build succeeds with all new files.
acceptance_criteria: Six LangChain tools are defined with proper zod schemas and Prisma interactions
LangGraph StateGraph is defined with nodes: guard_input, retrieve_context, llm_decide, execute_tool, guard_output
Graph has conditional edges: input blocked -> END, tool_calls -> execute_tool loop, no tool_calls -> guard_output
POST /api/agent/chat endpoint accepts message and returns AI response
Agent Guard processInput/processOutput are integrated into the graph flow
npm run build completes without errors
